display_text: Venomancer Aghanim's Scepter: Increases base damage per debuff from Septic Shock. This upgrade enhances Venomancer's role as a sustained damage dealer, punishing enemies who stay in prolonged engagements or fail to purge debuffs, making it particularly effective against tanky or healing-reliant heroes.
search_text: Venomancer Aghanim Scepter Septic Shock sustained damage anti-heal anti-tank debuff damage increase

display_text: Venomancer Aghanim's Shard: Adds a 300 damage and 1.6-second stun to Venomous Gale if dispelled. This upgrade acts as a strong anti-dispel mechanic, discouraging enemies from using purge spells or items like Eul's Scepter or Lotus Orb against Venomous Gale, turning it into a highly punishing initiation tool.
search_text: Venomancer Aghanim Shard Venomous Gale anti-dispel punish Eul Lotus Orb stun damage
